notes: v0.4.2 — Auto-update fix. http_get now follows up to 5 HTTP redirects, so the GitHub release-asset rb_url (302 → release-assets.githubusercontent.com CDN) downloads correctly. v0.4.1 silently failed to auto-update for this reason; users on v0.4.0 or v0.4.1 must manually install this .rbz once, after which silent updates resume. No other behavior changes.
